title.zh: 微信小程序逆向进阶 - 抓包与 Frida Hook 提取加密明文
title.en: WeChat MiniApp Reverse Advanced - Packet Capture & Frida Hook to Extract Plaintext

description.zh: 通过流量抓包结合 Frida 动态 Hook，在运行时提取加密参数、密钥、IV，并完成接口重放验证。
description.en: Combine packet capture with Frida dynamic hooking to extract encryption parameters, keys, IV at runtime and replay API requests.

content.zh: 启动微信小程序，触发登录业务（输入手机号 13800000000 和验证码 123456）
content.en: Launch WeChat MiniApp, trigger login (phone 13800000000, code 123456)

annotation.zh: 目标业务接口：/login，使用 AES-CBC 加密

content.zh: PC 端启动 Frida 服务：

caption.zh: 确保 frida-server 与客户端版本匹配

annotation.zh: 确保 frida-server 与客户端版本匹配，且设备已 root
annotation.en: Ensure frida-server version matches client, device rooted

content.zh: Frida 服务正常，设备列表显示 'com.tencent.mm'
content.en: Frida service OK, device list shows 'com.tencent.mm'

annotation.zh: 微信进程已附加，可注入脚本
annotation.en: WeChat process attached, ready to inject script

caption.zh: hook.js 包含对 Cipher.doFinal 和 MessageDigest.update 的拦截

annotation.zh: hook.js 包含对 Cipher.doFinal 和 MessageDigest.update 的拦截

content.zh: 脚本注入成功，开始监听 Java 层加密调用
content.en: Script injected, monitoring Java crypto calls

annotation.zh: Hook 点命中 javax.crypto.Cipher 和 java.security.MessageDigest
Frida 输出捕获的明文、密钥和初始向量
annotation.en: Frida outputs captured plaintext, key, and IV

content.zh: 登录请求的加密 payload: U2FsdGVkX1+... (Base64)

annotation.zh: 抓包工具同时捕获到密文，与 Frida 输出对应
annotation.en: Packet capture tool also records ciphertext, matching Frida output

content.zh: 使用 Python 本地解密验证：

codeBlocks.code:
from Crypto.Cipher import AES
import base64

key = b'0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef'
iv  = b'fedcba9876543210'

cipher = AES.new(key, AES.MODE_CBC, iv)
plain = cipher.decrypt(base64.b64decode("U2FsdGVkX1+..."))
print(plain)

annotation.zh: 解密结果与 Frida 捕获的明文一致，验证成功
annotation.en: Decrypted plaintext matches Frida output, verification successful

content.zh: 构造加密请求并重放接口：

codeBlocks.code:
import requests

# 构造 payload
payload = encrypt({"phone":"13800000000","code":"123456"}, key, iv)

# 重放接口
r = requests.post("https://api.example.com/login", json={"data": payload})
print(r.text)

annotation.zh: 重放成功，返回登录成功 token，完成闭环验证
annotation.en: Replay successful, returns login token, full loop validated

content.zh:
总结：
- 绕过 SSL Pinning（使用 JustTrustMe）
- 动态 Hook 提取 AES 明文、Key、IV
- 本地解密验证并实现接口重放
- 完整闭环：从流量抓包到业务复现
content.en:
Summary:
- Bypass SSL Pinning (using JustTrustMe)
- Dynamic hook to extract AES plaintext, Key, IV
- Local decryption verification and API replay
- Full loop: from packet capture to business reproduction

annotation.zh: 适用于小程序、App 的加密接口逆向分析
annotation.en: Applicable to reverse engineering of encrypted APIs in MiniApps and Apps
